question_intent: Find the name of the player who scored the most goals against the team with the most combined shutouts in 1989.

plan.question_intent: Find the name of the player who scored the most goals against the team with the most combined shutouts in 1989.
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.player_name, leaf_1.goals_against, leaf_1.team_name, leaf_1.shutouts FROM {{leaf_1}} AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.shutouts DESC, leaf_1.goals_against DESC

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT m.firstname || ' ' || m.lastname AS player_name, s.g AS goals_against, t.name AS team_name, COUNT(cs.idgoalie1) + COUNT(cs.idgoalie2) AS shutouts
join_clauses: JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
LEFT JOIN combinedshutouts AS cs ON t.tmid = cs.tmid AND s.year = cs.year
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, t.name
blocks.notes: Joins scoring, master, and teams to get player names and team names, then left joins combinedshutouts to count shutouts per team. Filters for the year 1989 and excludes goalies.

blocks.name: root
blocks.from_clause: FROM (SELECT leaf_1.player_name, leaf_1.goals_against, leaf_1.team_name, leaf_1.shutouts FROM {{leaf_1}} AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.shutouts DESC, leaf_1.goals_against DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
blocks.notes: Final scalar block that selects the player name with the most goals against the team with the most combined shutouts in 1989.

build_logs.notes: Joins scoring, master, and teams to get player names and team names, then left joins combinedshutouts to count shutouts per team. Filters for the year 1989 and excludes goalies.

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LEFT JOIN combinedshutouts AS cs ON t.tmid = cs.tmid AND s.year = cs.year
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LEFT JOIN combinedshutouts AS cs ON t.tmid = cs.tmid AND s.year = cs.year
WHERE (s.year = 1989)
LIMIT 5

steps.reason: where predicate made the probe empty

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LEFT JOIN combinedshutouts AS cs ON t.tmid = cs.tmid AND s.year = cs.year
WHERE (s.pos != 'G')
LIMIT 5

SELECT m.firstname || ' ' || m.lastname AS player_name, s.g AS goals_against, t.name AS team_name, COUNT(cs.idgoalie1) + COUNT(cs.idgoalie2) AS shutouts
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LEFT JOIN combinedshutouts AS cs ON t.tmid = cs.tmid AND s.year = cs.year
WHERE (s.pos != 'G')
GROUP BY s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, t.name

build_logs.notes: Final scalar block that selects the player name with the most goals against the team with the most combined shutouts in 1989.

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.player_name, leaf_1.goals_against, leaf_1.team_name, leaf_1.shutouts FROM (SELECT m.firstname || ' ' || m.lastname AS player_name, s.g AS goals_against, t.name AS team_name, COUNT(cs.idgoalie1) + COUNT(cs.idgoalie2) AS shutouts
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LEFT JOIN combinedshutouts AS cs ON t.tmid = cs.tmid AND s.year = cs.year
WHERE (s.pos != 'G')
GROUP BY s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, t.name) AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.shutouts DESC, leaf_1.goals_against DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT leaf_1.player_name
FROM (SELECT leaf_1.player_name, leaf_1.goals_against, leaf_1.team_name, leaf_1.shutouts FROM (SELECT m.firstname || ' ' || m.lastname AS player_name, s.g AS goals_against, t.name AS team_name, COUNT(cs.idgoalie1) + COUNT(cs.idgoalie2) AS shutouts
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LEFT JOIN combinedshutouts AS cs ON t.tmid = cs.tmid AND s.year = cs.year
WHERE (s.pos != 'G')
GROUP BY s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, t.name) AS leaf_1 ORDER BY leaf_1.shutouts DESC, leaf_1.goals_against DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT CONCAT(firstname, ' ', lastname) AS player_name
FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.playerid, m.firstname, m.lastname, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON t.tmid = sp.tmidloser
WHERE (sp.tmidloser != 'SEA')) ORDER BY g DESC LIMIT 1) AS leaf_1

question: What is the name of the non-goalie player who has the highest combined number of shutouts (as either the first or second goalie) and, in case of a tie, the highest number of goals allowed?
